title: stipa iberica var. pseudodasyphylla
intro: Stipa iberica var. pseudodasyphylla, also known as Iberian feather grass, is a type of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Iberian feather grass include relieving coughs, bronchitis, and asthma symptoms, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing stress. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Iberian feather grass have been used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
